message:
test(database+migration): add 109 unit tests for postgres, sqlite, and migration modules

B9 bead (asupersync-3narc.2.9) — database/migration invariant unit closure:
- postgres.rs: 59 new tests covering PgConnectOptions parsing, PgValue accessors
  and Display, PgRow typed getters, MessageBuffer wire format, parse_row_description,
  parse_data_row, parse_text_value/parse_binary_value all OIDs, parse_error_response,
  PgError Display, and hex::decode edge cases; also fixes redundant ref binding
- sqlite.rs: 33 new tests covering SqliteError Display and source(), SqliteValue
  PartialEq and accessor edge cases, SqliteRow get_idx/get_f64/get_blob/get_i64/
  get_str type mismatches, column_names iteration, and empty row handling
- migration/mod.rs: 17 new tests covering DualValueError Display/source,
  DualValue predicates and Debug, ensure_symbols idempotency, deserialization
  failure, MigrationConfig defaults and enabled_features, Adaptive boundary
  at 1024, MigrationFeature::all() count, and MigrationBuilder overrides
- barrier.rs: add #[allow(unsafe_code)] to 3 test functions using Pin::new_unchecked

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
